title: CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
